/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/ugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ugv_msgs/msg/man_ctrl__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ugv_msgs/msg/auto_ctrl__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ugv_msgs/msg/ugv_telemetry__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
